label: Thought stage
description: One named state of a ThoughtDef, providing the mood effect, opinion offset, and display text for that state.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display name for this thought stage shown in mood tooltips and thought logs. Supports translation keys.

labelSocial.label: Label (social)
labelSocial.description: Alternative display name used when this thought is a social memory. Supports translation keys.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Label used when displaying the thought abstractly (without a specific pawn context). Supports translation keys.

description.label: Description
description.description: Longer text shown in the mood tooltip for this stage. Required when baseMoodEffect is non-zero. Supports translation keys.

baseMoodEffect.label: Base mood effect
baseMoodEffect.description: Amount added to a pawn's mood while this stage is active. Negative values lower mood; positive values raise it.

baseOpinionOffset.label: Base opinion offset
baseOpinionOffset.description: Amount added to the pawn's opinion of the target pawn while this social thought stage is active.

visible.label: Visible
visible.description: Whether this stage shows up in the mood breakdown. Set to false to create hidden filler stages with no effect.
